# Test submit.navigationComment.trunkComparisonLink behavior.
# When enabled, navigation comments include a link comparing the branch
# against trunk, using the branch's upstream name.

as 'Test <test@example.com>'
at '2025-01-18T21:28:29Z'

# setup
cd repo
git init
git commit --allow-empty -m 'Initial commit'

# set up a fake GitHub remote
shamhub-setup
shamhub register alice
shamhub new origin alice/example.git
git push origin main
env SHAMHUB_USERNAME=alice
gs auth login

# opt in to the trunk comparison link
git config --local spice.submit.navigationComment.trunkComparisonLink true

# Create and submit a stack (main -> feature1 -> feature2).
git add feature1.txt
gs bc -m feature1
git add feature2.txt
gs bc -m feature2
gs stack submit --fill

# Each comment carries a link comparing its own branch against trunk.
shamhub dump comments
cmpenv stdout $WORK/golden/comments.txt

-- repo/feature1.txt --
feature 1

-- repo/feature2.txt --
feature 2

-- golden/comments.txt --
- change: 1
  body: |
    This change is part of the following stack:

    - #1 ◀
        - #2

    [Compare against trunk]($SHAMHUB_URL/alice/example/compare/main...feature1)

    <sub>Change managed by [git-spice](https://abhinav.github.io/git-spice/).</sub>
    <!-- gs:navigation comment -->
- change: 2
  body: |
    This change is part of the following stack:

    - #1
        - #2 ◀

    [Compare against trunk]($SHAMHUB_URL/alice/example/compare/main...feature2)

    <sub>Change managed by [git-spice](https://abhinav.github.io/git-spice/).</sub>
    <!-- gs:navigation comment -->
